---
title: "Solutions Propriétaires"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Harnesses Propriétaires

## Claude Code (Anthropic)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Anthropic |
| Modèle | Claude 4 Opus/Sonnet |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Activée par défaut |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (plan Enterprise) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Enterprise) |

**Points forts** : Best-in-class reasoning, tool calling natif, terminal integration, multi-file edits, MCP support.

**Points faibles** : Télémétrie par défaut, coût (Claude Opus = $15/M input), pas de self-hosting.

```bash
# Installation
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

# Désactiver télémétrie
export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1
```

## Cursor

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Anysphere |
| Modèle | GPT-4o, Claude 4, Gemini 2.5 |
| Niveau autonomie | L2 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Activée par défaut |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (Privacy Mode) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Privacy Mode) |

**Points forts** : IDE complet (fork VS Code), codebase indexing, multi-model, Composer (multi-file), Cursor Tab (autocomplétion).

**Points faibles** : Indexing envoie le code vers les serveurs, Privacy Mode payant.

## Windsurf (Codeium)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Codeium |
| Modèle | Claude 4, GPT-4o, Gemini 2.5 |
| Niveau autonomie | L2 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | ⚠️ Activée, pas d'opt-out clair |
| ZDR Enterprise | ⚠️ Partiel (exceptions: Remote Indexing, Memories, Recipes) |
| Training opt-out | ⚠️ Training sur prompts/outputs |

::: callout-warning
## Windsurf — Risque entreprise
Windsurf utilise les prompts/outputs pour le training sans opt-out clair. Le ZDR Enterprise a des exceptions (Remote Indexing, Memories, Recipes). **Non recommandé pour données sensibles sans contrat Enterprise négocié.**
:::

## GitHub Copilot

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | GitHub/Microsoft |
| Modèle | GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet |
| Niveau autonomie | L1-L2 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Activée par défaut |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (Copilot Enterprise) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Enterprise) |

**Points forts** : Intégration GitHub native, support multi-IDE (VS Code, JetBrains, Neovim), Copilot Workspace, Copilot Agent.

**Points faibles** : Moins puissant que Claude Code/Cursor pour l'agentic, télémétrie par défaut.

## Tabnine

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Tabnine (Tel Aviv) |
| Modèle | Propriétaire + Llama |
| Niveau autonomie | L1 |
| Licence | Propriétaire |
| Télémétrie | Configurable |
| ZDR Enterprise | ✅ (Tabnine Enterprise) |
| Training opt-out | ✅ (Enterprise) |

**Points forts** : Focus privacy, modèle on-prem disponible, autocomplétion LLM.

**Points faibles** : L1 seulement, pas d'agent, moins performant que la concurrence.

## Devin (Cognition)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Éditeur | Cognition Labs |
| Modèle | Propriétaire |
| Niveau autonomie | L4 |
| Licence | Propriétaire (SaaS) |
| Télémétrie | Activée |
| ZDR Enterprise | Non documenté |

**Points forts** : Premier "AI software engineer" fully-autonome, planning, terminal, browser.

**Points faibles** : Closed source, opaque, résultats mitigés en pratique, coût élevé.

## Outils découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_PROP_START -->
### [rtk](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk)
CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies

⭐ 72.2k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agentic-coding`, `ai-coding`, `anthropic`, `claude-code`, `cli`, `command-line-tool`, `cost-reduction`, `developer-tools`

### [ruflo](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo)
🌊 The leading agent meta-harness. Deploy intelligent multi-player swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features adaptive memory, self-learning intelligence,...

⭐ 65.4k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `agentic-framework`, `agentic-workflow`, `agents`, `ai-agents`, `ai-assistant`, `ai-coding`, `ai-skills`

### [gpt-engineer](https://github.com/AntonOsika/gpt-engineer)
CLI platform to experiment with codegen. Precursor to: https://lovable.dev

⭐ 55.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai`, `autonomous-agent`, `code-generation`, `codebase-generation`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `gpt-4`, `gpt-engineer`

### [awesome-claude-code](https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code)
A hand-picked collection of the finest of resources for the most awesome of agents, Claude Code, the undisputed champion of coding companions, from the unstoppable team at Anthropic PBC. A delectab...

⭐ 50.5k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent-skills`, `agentic-code`, `agentic-coding`, `ai-workflow-optimization`, `ai-workflows`, `anthropic`, `anthropic-claude`, `awesome`

### [agentic-awesome-skills](https://github.com/sickn33/agentic-awesome-skills)
AAS Core is the local, agent-first control plane for complete catalog discovery, agent-owned selection, stack validation, and planning, backed by 1,969+ agentic skills. Includes CLI, local MCP, cat...

⭐ 43.7k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent-skills`, `agentic-skills`, `ai-agent-skills`, `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `ai-workflows`, `antigravity`, `antigravity-skills`

### [tabby](https://github.com/TabbyML/tabby)
Self-hosted AI coding assistant

⭐ 33.8k | `Rust` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `coding-language`, `developer-experience`, `developer-tools`, `gen-ai`, `ide`

### [gpt-pilot](https://github.com/Pythagora-io/gpt-pilot)
The first real AI developer

⭐ 33.7k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `developer-tools`, `gpt-4`, `research-project`

### [DeepSeek-Reasonix](https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix)
DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

⭐ 27.4k | `Go` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent`, `agent-framework`, `ai-agent`, `ai-coding`, `cli`, `coding-agent`, `deepseek`, `developer-tools`

### [serena](https://github.com/oraios/serena)
A powerful MCP toolkit for coding, providing semantic retrieval and editing capabilities - the IDE for your agent

⭐ 26.6k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `ai-coding`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `ide`, `jetbrains`

### [kilocode](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode)
Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform. Build, ship, and iterate faster with the most popular open source coding agent.

⭐ 26.4k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-age`, `ai-coding`, `ai-developer-tools`, `chatgpt`, `claude`, `cli`, `gemini`

### [code-review-graph](https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph)
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-rep...

⭐ 23.9k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai-coding`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `code-review`, `graphrag`, `incremental`, `knowledge-graph`, `llm`

### [Archon](https://github.com/coleam00/Archon)
The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.

⭐ 23.0k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai`, `automation`, `bun`, `claude`, `cli`, `coding-assistant`, `developer-tools`, `typescript`

### [oh-my-pi](https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi)
⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

⭐ 18.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai-agent`, `ai-coding-agent`, `anthropic`, `bun`, `claude`, `cli`, `coding-assistant`, `llm`

### [pr-agent](https://github.com/The-PR-Agent/pr-agent)
🚀 PR Agent: The Original Open-Source PR Reviewer. This project It is not the Qodo free tier.

⭐ 12.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `code-review`, `codereview`, `coding-assistant`, `devtools`, `gpt-4`, `openai`, `pull-request`, `pull-requests`

### [claude-context](https://github.com/zilliztech/claude-context)
Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.

⭐ 12.2k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent`, `agentic-rag`, `ai-coding`, `claude-code`, `code-generation`, `code-search`, `cursor`, `embedding`

### [loop-engineering](https://github.com/cobusgreyling/loop-engineering)
Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audi...

⭐ 8.9k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `anthropic`, `automation`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `codex`

### [codeburn](https://github.com/getagentseal/codeburn)
Free, local tool to track AI coding token usage and cost across 31 tools and agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini and more), by model, project, and task. npx codeburn

⭐ 8.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai-coding`, `claude-code`, `cli`, `codex`, `cost-tracking`, `cursor-ide`, `developer-tools`, `menubar`

### [ccpm](https://github.com/automazeio/ccpm)
Project management skill system for Agents that uses GitHub Issues and Git worktrees for parallel agent execution.

⭐ 8.3k | `Shell` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `project-management`, `vibe-coding`

### [my-git](https://github.com/xirong/my-git)
A practical Git & GitHub handbook for modern engineering teams and AI-native development workflows. | 现代工程团队与 AI 编程时代的 Git / GitHub 实战手册

⭐ 7.4k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-20
**Tags** : `ai-coding`, `ai-native-development`, `git`, `git-flow`, `git-workflow`, `gitflow`, `github`, `github-flow`

### [superpowers-zh](https://github.com/jnMetaCode/superpowers-zh)
🦸 AI 编程超能力 · 中文增强版 — superpowers（116k+ ⭐）完整汉化 + 6 个中国原创 skills，让 Claude Code / Copilot CLI / Hermes Agent / Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro / Gemini CLI 等 16 款 AI 编程工具真正会干活

⭐ 7.1k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-21
**Tags** : `agent-skills`, `agentic-coding`, `ai-coding`, `chinese`, `claude-code`, `code-review`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_PROP_END -->
